text: Stepping through these modern, minimal corridors, I am greeted by the cool indifference of glass and steel. Yet, as I stand before this vibrant wall of research and development, filled with words and screens, I feel an internal shift—my mind awakens. There’s an invigorating contrast between the sterile formality outside and the dynamic, creative energy within this display. I sense the pulse of innovation and reflection, and I feel both humbled and energized by the possibilities that human curiosity continues to unlock in spaces like these.
